case_title: EVERETTE, ROSE vs. WILLIAMS, YULANDA et al

docket_entries.description: OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-29-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUL-29-1998, FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE TO OBTAIN ANSWER FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFT. OSC AND SANCTIONS TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING. VERITICATION IF DEFT HAS FILED BANKRUPTCY, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-13-1998 CONTINUED FROM JUL-29-1998 TO AUG-26-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-24-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUN-24-1998, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY WALTER L DAVIS, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-09-1998 CONTINUED FROM JUN-24-1998 TO JUL-29-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-26-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE STATUS OF BANKRUPTCY. SANCTIONS IMPOSED ARE VACATED HEARING SET FOR MAR-30-1999 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
ORDER RE: STATUS CONFERENCE AND OSC; SANCTIONS ARE VACATED

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-15-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO PAY SANCTIONS IMPOSED OSC TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY WALTER L DAVIS HEARING SET FOR JUN-24-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DECLARATION OF WALTER DAVIS RE; OSC AND SANCTION ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF EVERETTE, ROSE
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR APR-21-1998 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212

OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-05-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE FOR STATUS STATEMENT REGARDING STATUS OF BANKRUPTCY TO BE FILED 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY WALTER L DAVIS. HEARING SET FOR JUL-21-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-21-1999, OFF CALENDAR

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EVERETTE, ROSE AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, YULANDA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-15-1998 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-16-1998 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-27-1998

PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF APR-21-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON APR-21-1998, SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY WALTER L DAVIS., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-06-1998 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-30-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY WALTER L DAVIS. HEARING SET FOR MAY-05-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
